text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: During a practice session for our next<n>concert...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Trainer, have you, um... heard from<n>Hello?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon's voice falters, as if<n>she's not sure
she should ask.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as Smart Falcon suggests, Light<n>Hello hasn't
been contacting us as<n>much recently.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Do you think she's okay?
choice_data_list: She might just be busy with work.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I guess...
choice_data_list: It's nothing you guys should be worrying about.
It's nothing you guys should be worrying about.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Okay.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Falcon, if I may. I have a question<n>about the lyrics
and choreography.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Of course! Oh, so my take on this line<n>is...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though I played it down just<n>now, I am
honestly worried about<n>Light Hello.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later that day, I visit Light Hello's<n>office.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Ah, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... Good evening. Did you tell<n>everybody I'm
all right like I asked?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: I am all right... really. I'm alreadyworking on our next event.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you guys are the ones doing<n>all the hard
work—I'm just hitching a<n>ride.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
So really, I'm fine. You don't have to<n>worry about
me...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
choice_data_list: Why don't we have a chat?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
I realized that... I don't know the first<n>thing about
concerts.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
I mean, why would I? I was always a<n>backup
dancer...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
People actually had expectations of<n>me, once. I
enrolled in Tracen as the<n>granddaughter of a
legendary runner.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
But I was weak. I lost race after<n>race... Never got
to sing in a concert,<n>not even once.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
I felt grateful to all the fans who<n>supported me, but
I had no way to<n>convey it.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
That was what hurt most of all, never<n>being able to
tell my fans how much<n>they meant to me...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: That's why I want the girls to have<n>that chance.

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text:
What's the point if everyone gets to<n>sing? Don't
cheapen our hard work!

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text:
You say it's for the fans, but to me it<n>just sounds
like an excuse to escape<n>from the reality that we
can't win!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
When that girl accused us of being<n>escapist, I
realized something.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Maybe the reason I'm so bent on<n>bringing back
the Grand Concert is<n>because I do want to run
away.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
A chance for everyone to convey<n>their gratitude
sounds nice, but that's<n>just an excuse.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Deep down, I just want to be free<n>from the pain
and regret I still carry<n>with me.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
And I thought the Grand Concert<n>could make it all
go away...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Pathetic, isn't it... A "grown-up" roping<n>a bunch of
kids into giving her<n>damaged ego a boost.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: ...I'm sorry.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: I'm really, truly sorry.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I hope to learn lots more today.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...At least you're still motivated.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
They say that skipping one day puts<n>you three
days behind, so I cannot<n>afford to skip a day.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: My current status is "itching"—itching<n>to dance.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hehe... That's good.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: ...Hello.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hello?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I've come to say that, after<n>speaking with
Trainer here, I've<n>made up my mind.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
First, I want to apologize. For<n>involving you all in
this project.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
I realize now that I was forcing my<n>ideals onto
you. Concerts are meant<n>to be a stage for
winners.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Winning is, after all, everything to us<n>Umamusume.
It would be a grave<n>mistake to tarnish those
values.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...A mistake, you say?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Is the project truly a mistake?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Those opposed to us say, "Our fans<n>support us
because they know how<n>hard we train."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
"That's why we want to give back to<n>them by
winning." Their argument is<n>coherent and
reasonable.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
However, ever since I first saw the<n>performance
Falcon prepared for the<n>Grand Concert...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
A new program started running within<n>me—the
desire to convey my gratitude<n>in its purest form.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
A fan of mine also told me that the<n>emotions I
convey during a race and<n>a concert are different.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I would like to answer her<n>encouraging words in
kind.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
That is why I would like to participate<n>in the Grand
Concert, a stage where<n>all can stand side by side.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I understand the importance of<n>concerts now. If
there is a place<n>where I can convey my emotions,
I<n>would like to be there.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Is that a miscalculation on my part?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: No, you're exactly right.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
When you first told me about the<n>Grand Concert, I
got so excited my<n>heart started racing.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I started imagining all the things we<n>could do that
would never be possible<n>in a winning concert.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it'd be better if we didn't split<n>people up
into center stage or backup<n>dancers or anything...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
No, that wouldn't be right. It's the<n>serious
competition before a winning<n>concert that makes it
so special!<n>That's why everyone dreams of
standing center stage!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I pictured a stage where everyonecould be smiling!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Falcon...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even if this project did start as a way<n>for Light
Hello to come to terms with<n>her past...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Falcon and Bourbon have just<n>shown, the girls
have found another<n>meaning in it—something
deeply<n>compelling.
choice_data_list: Would you be open to reconsidering?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Reconsidering... what, exactly?
choice_data_list: The potential of the Grand Concert.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Please.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: You've got it all backwards!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: I should be the one begging you all<n>for help!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We all decide to rethink our goals for<n>the Grand
Concert once more.
